prompt: A cinematic anime-style fantasy movie poster featuring a female knight standing in the center of a cobblestone courtyard. She has long flowing silver hair and wears ornate white and dark blue armor with gold accents and a long, billowing white cape decorated with star motifs. She holds a glowing, magical sword pointing downwards, emitting bright blue starlight and magical particles. The background is a breathtaking, highly detailed gothic fantasy castle and cityscape at night. The night sky is spectacular, filled with a glowing milky way, a crescent moon, and numerous shooting stars. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, with the glowing sword illuminating the cobblestones. At the very top center, small elegant Japanese text reads "願いは、星に選ばれた。". In the lower third, large, elegant Japanese typography reads "星剣のレガリア". Just below the main title, smaller English text reads "REGALIA OF THE STARBLADE". At the very bottom, small Japanese text reads "星が墜ちる夜、王国最後の継承が始まる。".
